hero_description: Education 5.0 begins at home. We accompany moms, dads, children and young people in their integral development, strengthening mind, body and soul for a digital world.
pilares_description: We don't just form students, we form complete human beings. Our approach covers all spheres of personal and family development.
pilar_1_description: Mental health, Mindfulness, emotional management and cognitive resilience for parents and children.
pilar_2_description: Physical wellness, conscious nutrition and healthy habits in the digital age.
pilar_3_description: Spirituality, ethical values and connection with life purpose.
pilar_4_description: Social skills, digital citizenship and harmonious coexistence in the environment.
programa_parents_description: Learn to manage screen time, online safety and emotionally connect with your digital native children without losing authority.
programa_children_description: Playful workshops for children and youth focused on self-knowledge, frustration management and development of social skills (Soft Skills).
metodologia_description: At Metanoia, we apply the PRAXIS FRAME philosophy to the home. We invite the family to stop being simple observers of the educational process and become the origin thread that sustains learning.
metodologia_item_1_description: We help connect the great global challenges (SDG) with the values and daily life of the family.
metodologia_item_2_description: We offer a loving companionship that provides unconditional security so that children dare to explore and make mistakes.
metodologia_item_3_description: We establish dialogue rituals at home to share learning, doubts and dreams without the pressure of grades.
triada_title: The Link that unites the Universe
triada_description: Metanoia does not work alone. We are the glue that ensures that what is learned at school (College) and guided by the teacher (Ágora) is consolidated at home.
cta_title: Ready to strengthen your family nucleus?
